g.title: steward_journey
g.text: VCL — Steward Journey (drift → alert → SEE → ACT → deliver)

g.title: src
g.text: a rule/schema changes, or a scan fails

g.title: enf1
g.text: re-read live state, compare vs sealed anchors

g.title: adv
g.text: SEPARATE advisory step — the AI lives here, not in enforce
+ classification — DISPLAY ONLY, the gate never reads it

g.title: block
g.text: Agent → wrapper lookup_context → wrapper reads the verdict → unverified
→ WITHHOLD + honest note ("do not infer or fabricate")
the action tool ALSO refuses on the verdict — two structural layers

g.title: alert
g.text: → Slack + email: SEE url + ACT deep link

g.title: see
g.text: reads which dimension drifted, AI reasoning, recommendation

g.title: c1
g.text: guidance + seal command (copy to Cloud Shell)

g.title: s1
g.text: seal command is PHYSICALLY ABSENT — no one-click re-cert
investigate: which rule changed, confirm with the owner

g.title: c3
g.text: — DISPLAY ONLY, a SEPARATE chained step (not seal)

g.title: deliver
g.text: Agent retry → wrapper reads verdict → verified

g.title: footer
g.text: The human AUTHORIZES; the deterministic engine CERTIFIES —
no status field is ever hand-flipped. The VERDICT (verification aspect)
and the DISPLAY (governance-drift aspect) are written by DIFFERENT components.
